name: @reservation-core/domain
description: Layer-2 reservation domain on the @tenantkit/* kernel: courses, sessions, capacity, and the omluvenka (excuse → makeup-credit → redeem) engine. Vendor-free, pure domain logic.
_note: Two-layer split per ADR-0010. Layer 1 = @tenantkit/kernel (generic multi-tenant backbone). Layer 2 = this (the reservation domain). The product app (Termínář) composes both + adapters + plugins.
